name: Google Workspace Privileged Accounts Without MFA
description: Detects privileged google_workspace accounts missing MFA protections.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND (COALESCE(u.is_admin, false) = true) AND (COALESCE(u.is_enrolled_in_2sv, false) = false OR COALESCE(u.is_enforced_in_2sv, false) = false)
remediation: Immediately enforce MFA on privileged identities and suspend privileged actions until compliant.
